title: Too Good at Goodbyes
album: The Thrill Of It All (Special Edition)
why_this_song: Too Good at Goodbyes by Sam Smith (2017) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I'm way too good at goodbyes

No way that you'll see me cry
(No way that you'll see me cry)
I'm way too good at goodbyes
(I'm way too good at goodbyes) no

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "good" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "good" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "goodbyes" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "goodbyes" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You must think that I'm a fool
I'm never gonna let you close to me
No way that you'll see me cry

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Sam Smith one question about "Too Good at Goodbyes", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Sam Smith sobre "Too Good at Goodbyes", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Too Good at Goodbyes" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Too Good at Goodbyes" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Too Good at Goodbyes" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Too Good at Goodbyes" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
